runTitle: Local QA - Line Guard Current Hotspots Refactor

environment.backend: Cloud Run AI Engine local source

coveredSurfaces: Line guard production TS/TSX fail threshold gate
Root App useAIChatCore artifact/debug helper extraction
Cloud Run supervisor stream and single-agent stream helper extraction
Cloud Run orchestrator agent stream fallback/quota helper extraction
Cloud Run forced routing direct-knowledge, topology, and telemetry helper extraction
Cloud Run async jobs route request contract and result metadata helper extraction
Cloud Run AI Engine type/full test gates
Planning TODO and line-guard refactor closure evidence

expertAssessments.rationale: The refactor was verified with line-guard, targeted Vitest suites, root deterministic gates, and full AI Engine tests without changing public API shapes.
AI stream, forced routing, job route, and artifact integration behavior were protected by deterministic regression suites; no live provider behavior was intentionally changed.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Run production conversational QA after the next deploy if this refactor is bundled with runtime AI behavior changes.

expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Run AI Engine type/full tests and route-specific regression suites passed after splitting large stream, routing, and jobs modules.

completedImprovements.title: Reduce current line-guard fail-threshold hotspots from 5 to 0
completedImprovements.evidence: npm run line-guard passed with 0 fail-threshold violations after splitting useAIChatCore, supervisor-stream, orchestrator-agent-stream, orchestrator-routing, and routes/jobs hotspots.

notes: Initial line-guard baseline reported 40 warn files and 5 fail files over 800 lines.
Final npm run line-guard passed with 41 warn files and 0 fail files; warn files remain observation targets only.
Task 1 split useAIChatCore.ts from 1287 lines to 720 lines and added chat artifact/debug helpers.
Task 2 split supervisor-stream.ts from 1494 lines to 260 lines and orchestrator-agent-stream.ts from 1202 lines to 799 lines.
Task 3 split orchestrator-routing.ts from 1182 lines to 691 lines.
Task 4 split routes/jobs.ts from 978 lines to 738 lines.
Targeted tests passed: useAIChatCore, AI Engine stream suites, orchestrator-routing, and jobs route/dispatch suites.
npm run lint passed with existing qa-tracker.json max-size info only.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check passed.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run test passed 108 files / 1086 tests.
npm run docs:budget, npm run docs:ai-consistency, and git diff --check passed before closure.
No live AI, Vercel, Cloud Run production, or external provider call was executed for this deterministic local QA run.
